description: Product Description High quality white cotton wool balls Ingredients Cotton Wool Directions 1. For makeup application/removal, dampen the cotton pad with your chosen makeup remover or cleanser. Gently pat onto skin to apply or remove makeup. 2. For manicure correction, use a damp cotton pad to remove nail polish or clean up cuticles. 3. Always use a new cotton pad for each eye to prevent infection. 4. Dispose of used cotton pads responsibly after use. Safety Warning Use with caution around open wounds. Do not use for purposes other than makeup application, removal, and manicure correction. Manufacturer Contact Information Produced for: Quest Brands, BL9 9NB, UK. See more
